tags.name: `mc-list-item`
tags.description:
Purpose: To represent an item within a list.
Category: Content Display
When to use: When you need to display a single item within a list.
When not to use: When you need to display a group of items or a different layout.
Works with components: mc-list
Alternative component names: List Item, Option Item, Menu Item

Events:

  * `focus` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Dispatched when the list item receives focus.

  * `blur` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Dispatched when the list item loses focus.

  * `onfocus` {`CustomEvent<IMcListItem>`} - 

  * `onblur` {`CustomEvent<IMcListItem>`} - 

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - The default slot where main label goes.

  * `sublabel` {} - The `sublabel` slot where the sublabel goes.

  * `icon` {} - The `icon` slot where an `mc-icon` or any other forms of graphics go.

  * `trailingicon` {} - The `trailingicon` slot where an `mc-icon` or any other forms of graphics go.

  * `badge` {} - Used if you want to attach badge to the mc-button.

  * `actions` {} - The `actions` slot where action elements like buttons go.

Attributes:

  * `type` {`McListItemType | undefined`} - 

  * `selected` {`boolean | undefined`} - True if selected.

  * `focused` {`boolean | undefined`} - True if focused.

  * `justifyitems` {`JustifyItems | undefined`} - Allows to position items inside the button like label text & icon.
Specially useful when using width="full-width".

  * `hiddencheckmark` {`boolean | undefined`} - True if the checkmark should be hidden when selected.

  * `href` {`string | undefined`} - Passing a href value will render the list item as a HTML anchor element.

  * `target` {`string | undefined`} - Where to display the linked URL, as the name for a browsing context (a tab, window, or <iframe>).

  * `ariarole` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `orientation` {`Orientation | undefined`} - 

  * `tabindex` {`number | undefined`} - 

  * `visible` {`boolean | undefined`} - Whether the list item is visible.

  * `value` - The value.

  * `disabled` {`boolean | undefined`} - True if disabled.

Properties:

  * `mcCheckbox` - 

  * `name` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `_cachedLabel` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `fit` {`Fit | undefined`} - Fit of the component.

  * `icon` {`string | undefined`} - Name of the icon

  * `trailingicon` {`string | undefined`} - Name of the trailing icon

  * `label` {`string | undefined`} - Can be passed as a property or as a slot.

  * `sublabel` {`string | undefined`} - Can be passed as a property or as a slot.

  * `hiddenlabel` {`boolean | undefined`} - If set to true or the attribute is just presented without any value,
then the label will not appear, but will be used as `aria-label` only.

  * `disablediconslot` {`boolean | undefined`} - If set to true or the attribute is just presented without any value,
then the icon slots will not be rendered in to the DOM.

  * `disabledlabelslot` {`boolean | undefined`} - If set to true or the attribute is just presented without any value,
then the label slot will not be rendered in to the DOM.

  * `mcButton` - 

  * `type` {`McListItemType | undefined`} - 

  * `selected` {`boolean | undefined`} - True if selected.

  * `focused` {`boolean | undefined`} - True if focused.

  * `justifyitems` {`JustifyItems | undefined`} - Allows to position items inside the button like label text & icon.
Specially useful when using width="full-width".

  * `hiddencheckmark` {`boolean | undefined`} - True if the checkmark should be hidden when selected.

  * `href` {`string | undefined`} - Passing a href value will render the list item as a HTML anchor element.

  * `target` {`string | undefined`} - Where to display the linked URL, as the name for a browsing context (a tab, window, or <iframe>).

  * `ariarole` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `orientation` {`Orientation | undefined`} - 

  * `tabindex` {`number | undefined`} - 

  * `visible` {`boolean | undefined`} - Whether the list item is visible.

  * `value` - The value.

  * `disabled` {`boolean | undefined`} - True if disabled.

  * `_onMouseDown` -
